title: Designing a CSV Header for a Data Import Task
scenario: Generate a prompt that will instruct an LLM to produce a CSV header that accurately represents the structure and formatting of a complex data import task, including nested fields, data types, and delimiters. Ensure the LLM output is under 100 characters and adheres to standard CSV formatting best practices.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated CSV header meets the constraints provided, including character count and formatting.
Check if the generated CSV header accurately represents the structure and formatting of the complex data import task.
Evaluate the clarity and concision of the generated CSV header, ensuring it follows standard CSV formatting best practices.
